subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and it became known that certain foolish ones have assailed thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و معلوم گردید که بعضی از بیخردان تعرض بشما داشتند
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @personal instructions
